PushNotifications.comment_presentationOptions: Foreground-display options. iOS 14+ replaced the catch-all 'alert' with explicit 'banner' (the heads-up notification at the top of the screen) and 'list' (the Notification Center entry). The legacy 'alert' option still ships in Capacitor 8 as a backwards-compat shim but is the most-reported reason foreground banners stop appearing on iOS 14+ devices — switching to the explicit pair restores reliable display. 'badge' updates the app-icon count, 'sound' plays default.caf.
